channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hasbro is turning Optimus Prime and Mr. Potato Head into AI-powered voices — which is one sure-fire way to ruin our childhood memories
item.description: Hasbro's new AI character initiative may be a smart licensing strategy, but transforming iconic childhood figures into endlessly available conversational AI could weaken the very magic that made them beloved in the first place.
